case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS SALVADORI, DARRYLL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT.
RECORD ON APPEAL DELIVERED TO SUPER. COURT APPELLATE #20241.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALVADORI, DARRYLL JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 20241 ON 8-28-90. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALVADORI, DARRYLL $1,579.50 PRINCIPAL, $38.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,618.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
